form.formComment: Ran a fair race on debut when settled off the speed early and held position to finish fourth (23.37) at Warragul over 400m. The form from last run stacks up well. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Ran a fair race on debut when settled off the speed early and held position to finish fourth (23.37) at Warragul over 400m. The form from last run stacks up well. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Two runs so far have been ordinary, the latest when beaten 18 lengths into seventh over 460m at this track. This looks a nice race so she can improve.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two runs so far have been ordinary, the latest when beaten 18 lengths into seventh over 460m at this track. This looks a nice race so she can improve.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Contacted in back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Is a three start maiden overdue for a win, hitting the frame last start when second (26.23) over 460m at this track. Gave a big sight after racing on the speed much of the way. Looks the testing material.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Is a three start maiden overdue for a win, hitting the frame last start when second (26.23) over 460m at this track. Gave a big sight after racing on the speed much of the way. Looks the testing material.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at The Meadows over 525m. Hard to have this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at The Meadows over 525m. Hard to have this time.

form.formComment: Is a four start maiden overdue for a win, hitting the frame last start when third (26.36) over 460m at this track. Has hit the frame at the last two starts. Looks a key chance this line-up.

form.formComment: Has finished in the placings at last two, the latest when third (19.95) over 350m at Healesville. Has to do a bit more.

form.formComment: Most recently finished 5th on April 10 over 460m at this track behind Detectable beaten 16 lengths (26.85) in a Maiden. Must be included.

formComments.comment: Most recently finished 5th on April 10 over 460m at this track behind Detectable beaten 16 lengths (26.85) in a Maiden. Must be included.

form.formComment: Last start finished eighth in a Maiden on April 8 over 450m at Ballarat behind Boracay Bella, beaten 12 lengths (26.33). Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in his races. The latest effort was a 10 length fifth over 460m at this track. Not likely to feature on this occasion.
